details.IncidentDetail: "[10] [Appended, 20:19:46] [1] NEAR MISS TC'S IN AREA // CPYS LINE 8 // RP AFRAID WILL WILL A TC W/ MONDAY MORNING COMMUTE"
"[8] - DUE TO TC / CT LEFT LIGHTS FLASHING RED UNTIL THEY CAN HAVE A CREW RESPOND ON MONDAY - [Shared]"
"[6] 1039 MURR PD - LIGHTS HAVE BEEN LIKE THIS SINCE THIS AM / THEY HAVE ALSO ADV THEIR PUBLIC WORKS"
"[3] SEVERAL VEHS NEARLY TC'ING "
"[8] RP ADVG SEVERAL FT OFF RDWY / NOT REQ CHP"
"[6] TIRE ROLLED OFF ON RHS NEAR THE FENCE ON NB SIDE "
"[4] VEH IS IN CD "
"[1] MMBR / VEH WITH BO TIRE"
"[2] 114-CZP1 WB SIDE #2 LN IS OPEN AND 1 LN IS CLOSED "
"[1] ADAIR 114-CZP1 0630-1530 I40 BTWN 140-142 WILL ADVS DOT WHEN 97, VEH 1672382 BM 67455 "
"[8] EB 40 #1 LANE CLOSED W BROADWY TO J ST // WB SIDE #2 LN CLOSED FROM J ST TO WO W BROADWAY"
